mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (exam_name, paper_id, exam_mode, publish_status, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, total_score, pass_score, anti_cheat_switch, cut_screen_limit, auto_submit_switch, allow_repeat_enter, creator_id, remark) VALUES (#{examName}, #{paperId}, #{examMode}, #{publishStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{antiCheatSwitch}, #{cutScreenLimit}, #{autoSubmitSwitch}, #{allowRepeatEnter}, #{creatorId}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam SET publish_status = #{publishStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM exam WHERE publish_status >= 1

SELECT u.real_name AS teacherName, u.teacher_no AS teacherNo, COUNT(e.id) AS examCount, e.creator_id AS creatorId FROM exam e JOIN sys_user u ON e.creator_id = u.id WHERE e.publish_status >= 1 GROUP BY e.creator_id, u.real_name, u.teacher_no ORDER BY examCount DESC

SELECT e.id, e.exam_name AS examName, e.publish_status AS publishStatus, e.start_time AS startTime, e.end_time AS endTime, e.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, e.total_score AS totalScore, e.pass_score AS passScore, e.create_time AS createTime, p.paper_name AS paperName FROM exam e LEFT JOIN paper p ON e.paper_id = p.id WHERE e.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND e.publish_status >= 1 ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
